text:
DRUG_NONE_TKNG_DSCHRG_CD High-Risk Drug (Is taking): None of above (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents that at the time of discharge the patient was not taking any drugs in the high-risk drug classes. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
563 CHMTHRPY_ADMSN_CD CHMTHRPY_ADMSN_CD Treatment: Chemotherapy (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving chemotherapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
564
